Short CV

Pınar Aslan completed her undergraduate degree in Comparative Literature and Public Relations at Istanbul Bilgi University. She received her MA in Public Relations at Marmara University. Aslan completed another master's degree in literature and cultural studies at the Universidad de Salamanca, Spain in 2010, and continued her doctoral studies at the same university. Aslan, who became a doctor with a Cum Laude degree with her thesis titled "Angels of America: women icons in the USA and Latin America and their effect on female identity", started a second doctorate at Istanbul University Faculty of Communication in Turkey; she carried out research in various Latin American countries, especially Chile, for her thesis titled "Cultural And Creative Industries as an International Public Relations Strategy: A Study on Turkish TV Series in Latin American Market”. Aslan, who completed her doctoral studies in 2018, is an associate professor at Üsküdar University. Her research interests focus on culture and creative cultural industries, international communication, digital culture and intercultural communication.
